snippet.description:

Lyrics:

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better

Save your tears for another day (Yeah)
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day, ooh, girl (Ah)
I said save your tears for another day (Ah)

Save your tears for another day (Ah)

snippet.title: AGUERO FAIRYTALE AT THE ETIHAD | Man City 5-0 Everton Highlights
snippet.description:
Sergio Aguero came off the bench to score twice as City thrashed Everton 5-0 as the champions ended the Premier League campaign in style.
Kevin De Bruyne started the rout in the first-half with Gabriel Jesus quickly adding another.

Phil Foden wrapped up the three points after the re-start before Aguero's magical cameo saw him score twice in five minutes.

Match Report can be read here: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/manchester-city-v-everton-match-report-23-may-2021-63757377

snippet.title: Amenazzy, Jay Wheeler - Sali├│ (Video Oficial)
snippet.description:
Amenazzy, Jay Wheeler - Sali├│ (Video Oficial) 2021

Suscr├нbete al Canal: https://rimas.ffm.to/ytamenazzy

M├бs videos de Amenazzy:
Jalape├▒o Rmx. ft. Wiz Khalifa, Myke Towers - https://youtu.be/h2xUMXCvSkUтАЛ
Tu Aroma ft.Rochy RD  - https://youtu.be/6g0P65dhYsYтАЛ
Calmarme - https://youtu.be/wIQpmXN_B_w

LETRA

(Amenazzy)
Aaaaaahhh Amenazzy, a ese novio la dejo, ahora quiere despegar la mente y janguealтАЩ,
Cansada de trabajar, de la monoton├нa de todos los d├нas,
Sali├│, se fue, se ve que est├б mejor ahora que est├б sin ├йl, 
Dice que no vuelve pa atr├бs,
Que la vida es una, y que el tiempo vuela, 
Que prefiere estar sola, que mal acompa├▒ada otra vez.

(Jay Wheeler)
Ella dice que los amores, son de novela,
Muchos le tiran, pero ella r├бpido los cancela,
Y si vieras la foto que sube en traje de ba├▒o, no quiere amores, porque ya le hicieron da├▒o,
Lleva soltera m├бs de un a├▒o, su ex le escribe dici├йndole te extra├▒o, 
Pero, pichea porque dice, que sola est├б mejor 
y frontea, no quiere saber nada de amor
 y pichea, porque dice que soltera est├б mejor  
Frontea, no quiere saber nada de amor.

(Amenazzy)
Sali├│, se fue, se ve que est├б mejor, 
Ahora que est├б sin ├йl, 
dice que no vuelve pa atr├бs,

(Jay Wheeler)
Que la vida es una, y que el tiempo vuela, 
Prefiere estar sola, que mal acompa├▒ada otra vez.

(Amenazzy)

El coraz├│n vac├нo, pero la copa est├б llena, 
culo grande, piel canela, 
disfruta la vida ahora que est├б soltera, 
que est├б libre y puede hacer lo que quiera (eyyy), 
anda con una amiga que es su c├│mplice, 
si se pasan de tragos, van a besarse, 
por ahora solo quiere liberarse, 
que nadie le recuerde al bobo ese, 
ahora hace todo lo que contigo no hac├нa (aahhh), 
ahora fuma, bebe y llega al otro d├нa, 
ahora hace todo lo que contigo no hac├нa (aahhh), 
ahora fuma, bebe y llega al otro d├нa.

(Jay Wheeler)
Sali├│, se fue, 
Se ve que est├б mejor, ahora que est├б sin ├йl, 
Dice que no vuelve paтАЩ atr├бs.

(Amenazzy)
Que la vida es una, y que el tiempo vuela, 
Que prefiere estar sola, 
Que mal acompa├▒ada otra vez.
Suena de fondo

(Ahora hace todo lo que contigo no hacia aahhh, ahora fuma, bebe y llega al otro d├нa,)

About Anne-Marie:
Anne-Marie has proved to be one of the UKтАЩs most exciting and successful British breakthrough pop stars of recent years. A former 3x world karate champion and West End child star-turned 9x BRIT Award nominee, A-MтАЩs rise has been nothing short of meteoric. In 2018 Anne-Marie released her debut album, тАШSpeak Your MindтАЩ which featured the hit singles 'Alarm', 'Ciao Adios', 'Heavy', 'Friends', '2002' and 'Perfect to Me'. She subsequently ended that year as the UKтАЩs biggest-selling debut artist, selling out headline shows and playing stadium dates supporting long-time friend and champion Ed Sheeran in the process.

She has also sang on and co-written many other hits such as Birthday, Rockabye, Don't Leave Me Alone,  To Be Young, f*ck, i'm lonely and Don't Play, collaborating with the likes of Clean Bandit, Marshmello, David Guetta, Lauv, Rudimental, Doja Cat and KSI, as well as starring on The Greatest Showman: Reimagined soundtrack performing Rewrite the stars alongside James Arthur.

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - No Chances (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots lyric video for тАЬNo ChancesтАЭ from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.
Stream/Download Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

LYRICS
We come for you,
No chances.

In my house shoes in a foot race,
In this house we got feng shui,
Get the door to blow you away,
Flamethrower, you a switchblade,
Feet planted on grip tape,
With my shoulders squared,
And my back straight,
Got a good base and a loose tongue,
Notorious in the octagon.

We got people on the way,
We want you home in one piece now,
(Run away, run away)
We get bodies every day,
We want you home in one piece now.

We come for you,
No chances.

HowтАЩd you get the location?
Put together pieces?
The say they sell the information,
In those terms of agreement,
We spent some weekends on the grind,
Surveillances outside, we see when you arrive,
Ride or die my son.

I wanna run away
DonтАЩt wanna lie, I donтАЩt want a life
Send me a gun
And IтАЩll see the sun 

IтАЩd rather run away
DonтАЩt wanna lie, I donтАЩt want a life
Send me a gun
And IтАЩll see the sun 

You need an instant ease
From the life where you got plenty
Of every hurt and heartbreak
You just take it all to the face 

I know that you want to cry
But itтАЩs much more to life than dying
Over your past mistakes
And people who threw dirt on your name 

Since ten, I been feeling lonely
Had friends but they was picking on me
Always thinking why my lips so big?
Was I too dark? Can they sense my fears?

These gay thoughts would always haunt me
I prayed God would take it from me
ItтАЩs hard for you when youтАЩre fighting
And nobody knows it when youтАЩre silent 

IтАЩd be by the phone
Stanning Nicki morning into dawn
Only place I felt like I belonged
Strangers make you feel so loved, you know? 

And IтАЩm happy by the way
That I made that jump, that leap of faith
IтАЩm happy that it all worked out for me
Imma make my fans so proud of me, (ohhhh)

You just take it all to the face

Over your past mistakes
And people who throw dirt on your name

snippet.title: Qu├й es Ham├бs, el grupo militante palestino que controla Gaza y al que se enfrenta Israel | BBC Mundo
snippet.description:
Su nombre significa Movimiento de Resistencia Isl├бmica y su origen se remonta a los primeros d├нas de la Intifada palestina de 1987 en contra de la ocupaci├│n israel├н de Cisjordania y la Franja de Gaza.

Estados Unidos, la Uni├│n Europea, Jap├│n e Israel lo consideran una organizaci├│n terrorista pues sus militantes han estado detr├бs de varios atentados en Israel. 

Hoy es el grupo isl├бmico m├бs numeroso dentro del pueblo palestino y desde el 2007 tom├│ el control de Gaza.

En este video te explicamos m├бs de este grupo islamista que ha jugado un rol clave en el conflicto israel├н palestino.

Suscr├нbete al canal aqu├н ЁЯСЙ https://bbc.in/2UHHVsu

IтАЩm already bored,
IтАЩm pretty sure IтАЩve seen this one before,

Singing out.

TheyтАЩre nodding,
Heads are moving up and down,
You got it,

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! тЦ║тЦ║ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! тЦ║тЦ║ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donтАЩt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamтАЩs safe and try to crack open your opponentsтАЩ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youтАЩre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support тАФ or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent's Guide:
http://supercell.com/en/parents/

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max. 

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube
Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram
About HBO Max:
HBO Max is WarnerMediaтАЩs direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMediaтАЩs rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

snippet.title: The NBA Arrives In Fortnite
snippet.description:
Lace up... The Crossover is going to knock you off your feet. https://fn.gg/NBA

For the first time ever, the NBA is joining Fortnite! Coinciding with the debut of the State Farm NBA Play-In Tournament, Fortnite x NBA: The Crossover brings basketballтАЩs best into the Item Shop and Fortnite Creative, and with Team Battles, a unique experience featuring all 30 NBA teams in Fortnite.

Debuting on May 21 at 8pm ET, players can suit up and rep any of the league's 30 teams. The In The Paint Set includes 31 uniforms, including all 30 NBA teams. 

Also available, grab the Shoot & Score Pack to get the Hookshot Emote and Mini Hoop Back Bling, which can feature the logo of all 30 NBA teams. When other players have the Mini Hoop Back Bling equipped, youтАЩll be able to call your shot! 

If youтАЩre more of a point guard, show off your handles with the Dribblin' traversal Emote.

#FortniteNBA #TheCrossover #FortniteNBATheCrossover

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Saturday (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots lyric video for "Saturday" from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.
Stream / Download Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

LYRICS
Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Lose my sense a time or two
Weeks feel like days
Medicate in the afternoon.
And I just want to know
Have you lost your footing too?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Ooh you're good.
These are my dancing shoes.
We paint the town.
Ooh you're good.
Thought I would dance with you.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

(Feeling great)
Life moves slow on the ocean floor.
(Feeling great)
I can't feel the waves anymore.
Did the tide forget to move?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

snippet.title: Dentro de un edificio... que FLOTA??!
snippet.description:
Hoy me he colado en el CaixaForum de Madrid para mostraros una de las estructuras m├бs curiosas de la ciudad: es un edificio... que flota! sisi, flota. O sea puedes caminar por debajo del edificio. En este v├нdeo analizamos su funcionamiento y entendemos qu├й llev├│ a los arquitectos Herzog & de Meuron a dise├▒ar un edificio as├н.

Adem├бs visitamos la exposici├│n de Jean Prouv├й, uno de los mejores ingenieros y dise├▒adores de mobiliario del siglo XX, y os ense├▒o uno de mis muebles favoritos ever que hizo.

V├нdeo en colaboraci├│n con el CaixaForum de Madrid.

snippet.description:
Los Tuzos del Pachuca se hacen de una gran ventaja en su compromiso de la ida de los cuartos de final del Guardianes 2021, tras doblegar 3-1 a las ├Бguilas del Am├йrica.

http://bit.ly/2YAWO4p SUSCR├НBETE y mantente informado con las ├║ltimas noticias del mundo deportivo.

Erick Aguirre hab├нa logrado adelantar a los suyos en el primer tiempo, pero un tanto de Leo Su├бrez puso el 1-1 previo a la llegada del medio tiempo.
Para la segunda parte los Tuzos se volvieron a hacer de la ventaja gracias al tanto de Felipe Pardo, y concluyeron con la tarea en los minutos finales con el gol de Luis Ch├бvez. 

El Am├йrica, por su parte termin├│ el juego con 10 hombres debido a la expulsi├│n de Pedro Aquino.

snippet.title: El momento en que una torre de Gaza es derrumbada en un ataque a├йreo israel├н | BBC Mundo
snippet.description:
Estas im├бgenes registradas durante una transmisi├│n en vivo de la televisi├│n ├бrabe de la BBC muestran el momento en que una torre de Gaza fue derrumbada por un ataque israel├н con cohetes. La torre residencial de Al-Shorouk est├б situada en una zona densamente poblada de la ciudad palestina. 90 minutos antes del ataque los residentes fueron alertados para que la evacuaran. El ataque se produjo en medio de una escalada de violencia entre israel├нes y palestinos que estall├│ el lunes, despu├йs de varias semanas de crecientes tensiones. Hasta este jueves al menos 67 personas murieron en Gaza, inclu├нdos varios ni├▒os, y 7 en Israel.
